content: Install svix library for Resend webhook signature verification
Backend: POST /api/webhooks/resend (svix signature verify + event handlers)
Backend: enriched /api/public/stats (lang distribution + top sessions anonymized)
Backend: POST /api/admin/blacklist/import (CSV text parser, batch insert)
Backend: JWT rotation system (sessions in DB + revoke + rotate-secret endpoints)
Frontend: enrich PublicStats page with FR/EN distribution + top sessions
Frontend: bulk CSV import UI in admin blacklist tab
Frontend: admin sessions tab (list, revoke, rotate secret)
Frontend: admin email delivery status column (sent/delivered/bounced)
Prepare DNS instructions + Resend webhook setup docs
